indications.text:
Tekturna HCT is indicated for the treatment of hypertension, to lower blood pressure. Lowering blood pressure
reduces the risk of fatal and nonfatal cardiovascular events, primarily strokes and myocardial infarctions. These
benefits have been seen in controlled trials of antihypertensive drugs from ...

Tekturna HCT is indicated for the treatment of hypertension.
Both aliskiren and hydrochlorothiazide are associated with dose-dependent and dose-
independent adverse effects. Patients treated with Tekturna HCT may experience any or all of
these adverse effects. For dose-dependent adverse effects, usi...

Tekturna HCT is indicated for the treatment of hypertension.
Add-On Therapy
A patient whose blood pressure is not adequately controlled with aliskiren alone or hydrochlorothiazide alone
may be switched to combination therapy with Tekturna HCT.
